--- !bad_grant_insert_on_sequence.sql
GRANT INSERT ON SEQUENCE s1 TO ROLE r1

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/ddl/!bad_grant_insert_on_sequence.sql:1:7: expected sequence privilege: SELECT, UPDATE
  1|  GRANT INSERT ON SEQUENCE s1 TO ROLE r1
   |        ^~~~~~


--- AST

  BadNode: &ast.BadNode{
    NodeEnd: 38,
    Tokens:  []*token.Token{
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Raw:      "GRANT",
        AsString: "GRANT",
        End:      5,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",
        Raw:      "INSERT",
        AsString: "INSERT",
        Pos:      6,
        End:      12,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:  "ON",
        Space: " ",
        Raw:   "ON",
        Pos:   13,
        End:   15,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",
        Raw:      "SEQUENCE",
        AsString: "SEQUENCE",
        Pos:      16,
        End:      24,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",
        Raw:      "s1",
        AsString: "s1",
        Pos:      25,
        End:      27,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:  "TO",
        Space: " ",
        Raw:   "TO",
        Pos:   28,
        End:   30,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",
        Raw:      "ROLE",
        AsString: "ROLE",
        Pos:      31,
        End:      35,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Space:    " ",
        Raw:      "r1",
        AsString: "r1",
        Pos:      36,
        End:      38,
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRANT INSERT ON SEQUENCE s1 TO ROLE r1
